title: Daily Menu Panoramas
description: Tired of those Mojang Panoramas? Yeah me too
body:
![Menu!](https://huhuheh.x02.me/i/256XQ.png)

![Last Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/huhuhuhuheh/daily-menu-panoramas)
![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/huhuhuhuheh/daily-menu-panoramas?style=flat&color=orange)
[![Supported Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.5_--_1.21.11-purple?style=flat)](https://modrinth.com/project/bsrPC26E)

New Panoramas for your game! Why? Because Why Not

Daily Menu Panoramas is a mod that adds new panoramas to your game instead of the default ones from resource packs* or mojang ones, they're daily, or event or season based, like uhh... winter or hallowen?

<details>
<summary>Note</summary>
* The mod does not work with a resource pack that changes its panorama
</details>


This mod is free to contribute for new Panoramas! If so read the instructions [here](https://docs.ehis.gay/minecraft/daily-menu-panoramas/how-to-submit-a-panorama-to-the-mod/)
